race.comment: SHOHISHA (12) loomed strongly along the inside first-up, before she peaked on the run with a slashing fourth in the G2 Guy Walter over 1400m at Randwick. Looks ready to go on with it now and gets her chance with the 51kg. Top prospect. FIRESTORM (9) unlucky not to win this race last year and saves her best for the Rosehill track. Savaged the line first-up when sixth in the G2 Guy Walter. Will relish the fast tempo with the 53.5kg. Respect. LAZZURA (1) classy mare who went to a new level winning multiple Group races in the Spring. Exceptional return when she stalked the speed before condition gave out with a narrow second over 1300m in the G2 Millie Fox here. J Mac sticks and should be primed for this. ARCTIC GLAMOUR (5) circled the field first-up before launching late from last on the turn to finish a close-up third over 1400m in the G2 Guy Walter. Gets her desired conditions and no shock to see her finish over the top of these. CINSAULT (8) gone to a new level this prep and keep safe.
